name: clever-cloud-bot
description: Clever Cloud Automation Bot for Scalingo

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log('Checking for Chromium...'); const fs=require('fs'); const paths=['/usr/bin/chromium-browser','/usr/bin/chromium']; paths.forEach(p=>{if(fs.existsSync(p)) console.log('Found:',p); else console.log('Not found:',p);})"
